results.title: Slice
results.overview: In a spooky small town, when a slew of pizza delivery boys are slain on the job, two daring survivors set out to catch the culprits behind the cryptic crime spree.

results.title: Slice
results.overview: A serial killer is on the loose. There have been gruesome murders, with victims being ghastly dismembered and their severed body parts dumped in various locations. As the bodies keep piling up, the police remain in the dark without a single clue.

results.title: Slice
results.overview: Trilogy of slasher comedies from comedian/director Pierre Edwards.

results.title: Slice
results.overview: A shocking story at a sobriety meeting leads to several tales of men who have given up their manhood for fame or drugs

results.title: Slice!
results.overview: With 18 golf holes of terror, heads will surely roll.

results.title: Slice
results.overview: A brother and sister are not who  they seem to be

results.title: Night Slice
results.overview: Stuck in a depressing and mind numbing routine, Pierre decides to trade the sweaty atmosphere of the factory for the conditioned air of a hotel room. Locked up with three other tenants in a dreary and dim-lighted suite, he is forced into an idle and aimless lifestyle, no more fruitful than the mindless hustle and bustle he left behind — that is, until this oppressive dullness gives birth to an idea…

results.title: Slice
results.overview: Benson Slice, a degenerate gambler that is facing financial issues, struggles to maintain his work and family life. Through a high roller poker game controlled by "Angela Harding", Slice is provided with an opportunity to clear his debts and begin a new chapter in his life.

results.title: Slice
results.overview: After having a dream about kissing his best friend, Sasha decides he has to declare his feelings to him immediately.

results.title: Slice
results.overview: Years after losing her grandmother, Roberta lives a solitary life. Her isolation leaves little space for affection, and she is trapped in a draining daily grind. Everything changes when she discovers an old recipe book belonging to her late grandmother, a master in the kitchen. Following the handwritten instructions, Roberta redescobers her love for food and the art of bringing people together.

results.title: Slice of Life
results.overview: Pierre has four months left to live if he does not find a new liver. His only hope is a transplant from his brother, Paul. But Pierre hates Paul and has refused to see him for the past ten years. They are different in every aspect : their way of life, their tastes. Nevertheless, Marie, Pierre's fiancee, is determined to reconcile the two men. A love-hate relationship develops, disrupting the trio, recomposing the couples and even going so far as to change their personalities. After a few too many drinks and a bit of fooling around, the settling of scores between the two brothers will come to a surprising end.

results.title: Slice
results.overview: Years after losing her grandmother, Roberta lives a solitary life. Her isolation leaves little space for affection, and she is trapped in a draining daily grind. Everything changes when she discovers an old recipe book belonging to her late grandmother, a master in the kitchen. Following the handwritten instructions, Roberta redescobers her love for food and the art of bringing people together.

results.title: Slice
results.overview: SLICE follows a relationship born out of the violence of the Pinochet dictatorship in Chile interwoven with a budding queer romance between a mortician and the granddaughter of the man she is embalming.

results.title: Slice
results.overview: Rico Golden and his homeboys from Memphis, Tennessee submerge themselves in an original swimming art form of athleticism, creativity, and joy called slicing.

results.title: Slice
results.overview: Guy is having trouble sleeping when suddenly he hears a suspicious noise in the night.

results.title: Slice
results.overview: A horror-comedy short about a group of pizza-worshipping occultists trying to root out a traitor in their ranks.

results.title: Slice
results.overview: A young woman explains her methods of coping with pressures at work.

results.title: Slice
results.overview: A group of girls come together for a Halloween costume party and little do they know a masked killer is hiding in the shadows of the house waiting to make them his next victims.

results.title: The Slice
results.overview: Staying with an old friend in a new city, a former Olympian aims to let loose on his last day. All the while an important decision looms above his head…

results.title: One Slice
results.overview: A man goes through many steps to recover his lost slice of pizza.
